title: erigeron inornatus
intro: Erigeron inornatus, also known as the downy fleabane, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erigeron inornatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various skin conditions. Erigeron inornatus can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
